title: Greews Races
description: Race selection mod, always wanted to play as a Dwarf, Elf, Fairy or Human?! Now you can, this mod adds new races with different bonuses and maluses. Oh and Vampire Biome
body:
**Race selection mod**

At the start of the game choose a race you want to play, each comming with its own bonuses, and/ or maluses. 

**We have 8 races so far.**

Play as Human, Wood Elf, Night Elf, Dwarf, Demon, Vampire and more to come!
Some bonues and maluses may be only numerical like +% to damage with certain weapon or completely mechanical like Vampires who burn in sunlight, but get lifesteal and more damage with any weapon. 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
### Human
**Bonuses:**
- +20% damage with sword

**Maluses:**
- No specific drawbacks

### Dwarf
**Bonuses:**
- +20% damage with axe
- +20% mining speed
- +2 armor
- +20% reach

**Maluses:**
- -20% damage with sword
- -20% damage with bow
- -10% movement speed
- -20% height

### Night Elf
**Bonuses:**
- +20% damage with crossbow
- +20% movement speed at night

**Maluses:**
- -20% damage with axe
- -20% damage with bow
- +20% height

### Wood Elf
**Bonuses:**
- +20% HP
- +20% damage with bow
- +10% movement speed

**Maluses:**
- -20% damage with axe
- +20% height

### Demon
**Bonuses:**
- +20% damage with sword
- Immunity to fire and lava

**Maluses:**
- -20% damage with bow
- -20% damage with crossbow
- Damage from water and rain

### Vampire
**Bonuses:**
- +20% damage with all weapons
- 30% chance for lifesteal

**Maluses:**
- Burns in sunlight

### Ghoul
**Bonuses:**
- Can breathe underwater
- Rotten flesh feeds it
- Does not burn in sunlight

**Maluses:**
- Can only eat raw meat

### Fairy
**Bonuses:**
- +10% movement speed
- +20% damage with trident
- +50% armor from leather armor
- +20% reach

**Maluses:**
- -30% height
- -20% damage with axe
- -20% damage with pickaxe

</details>



**8 Supported languages**

CZ, SK, PL, EN, DE, ES, UA and RU

**Command (OPs only):**

/race menu player_name

will let you summon the race selection menu for specific player to change race.

**Command (All players):**

/race language

will let you summon the language selection menu to change language of mod and mods UI easily. 

**Dependancies:**

You need Terrablender and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

Made with Servers in Mind, races chosen will show as a prefix before your name in game and in scoreboard like: **[Human] Greews**

**Supported versions:**

1.21.11, 1.21.10, 1.21.1, 1.20.1
